issues: fetch_prices is called without required kwargs 'tickers' and 'period' as per adapter contract.
compute_signal does not identify which asset to buy or sell; it only returns a generic signal without specifying positions per asset.
target_allocations equally weights all assets on RISK_ON, but spec requires buying the lower priced asset and selling the higher priced asset to capture the spread.
No logic to differentiate buy/sell allocations per asset based on price spread, violating entry logic in spec.
Indentation errors in compute_signal (e.g., missing indentation under if statements) which would cause runtime errors.
